mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lineage_edge_v2 WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND source_id = #{sourceId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM lineage_edge_v2 WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC

WITH RECURSIVE upstream_cte AS ( SELECT e.*, 1 AS depth FROM lineage_edge_v2 e WHERE e.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND e.target_id = #{targetId} AND e.is_deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT e.*, c.depth + 1 FROM lineage_edge_v2 e INNER JOIN upstream_cte c ON e.target_id = c.source_id WHERE e.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND e.is_deleted = 0 AND c.depth < #{maxDepth} ) SELECT * FROM upstream_cte

WITH RECURSIVE downstream_cte AS ( SELECT e.*, 1 AS depth FROM lineage_edge_v2 e WHERE e.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND e.source_id = #{sourceId} AND e.is_deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT e.*, c.depth + 1 FROM lineage_edge_v2 e INNER JOIN downstream_cte c ON e.source_id = c.target_id WHERE e.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND e.is_deleted = 0 AND c.depth < #{maxDepth} ) SELECT * FROM downstream_cte
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lineage_edge_v2 (tenant_id, source_id, source_type, target_id, target_type, relation_type, properties, version, created_by) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{sourceId}, #{sourceType}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{relationType}, #{properties}, #{version}, #{createdBy})

INSERT INTO lineage_edge_v2 (tenant_id, source_id, source_type, target_id, target_type, relation_type, properties, version, created_by) VALUES
(#{e.tenantId}, #{e.sourceId}, #{e.sourceType}, #{e.targetId}, #{e.targetType}, #{e.relationType}, #{e.properties}, #{e.version}, #{e.createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE lineage_edge_v2 SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE lineage_edge_v2 SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND source_id = #{sourceId} AND target_id = #{targetId}
UPDATE lineage_edge_v2 SET version = #{version} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lineage_edge_v2 WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_deleted = 0
